name: dev-squad
description: Full-stack dev team agent swarm with 11 specialized agents, zero-to-ship capability, and runtime workflow contract. Agents: coordinator (opus), architect (opus), designer (sonnet think_harder), backend (sonnet), frontend (sonnet), reviewer/security-lead (sonnet), qa-engineer (sonnet), auditor (sonnet), devops (sonnet), git-ops (sonnet), writer (sonnet). v4.12.0 hardens production discipline: (1) PreToolUse security pattern hook blocks/warns 9 dangerous code patterns (eval, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, child_process.exec, os.system, pickle, GitHub Actions injection, etc.) — advisory by default, strict via env flag; (2) Phase 6 SHIP pre-seeds .claude/ docs in generated apps (CLAUDE.md + .claude/architecture.md + .claude/conventions.md + .claude/gotchas.md) so future Claude sessions are self-aware; (3) formal Phase 5 iteration loop with verification rollback on regression; (4) mandatory 3-min auto-reviewer wait before merge (Gemini/Copilot/CodeRabbit need time). Phase 3.5 DESIGN gate prevents AI-slop UI. Multi-language quality metrics (JS/TS, Go, Python). saas-patterns covers full-stack SaaS (Part 1 backend + Part 2 frontend admin dashboard with drill-down).
